overview: A comprehensive School Management System for administrators to manage student profiles, fee structures, payments, and teacher attendance — all behind a secure admin login.
features: Admin login with all routes protected
Student profiles with full details, search, and class-wise organization
Fee structures and payment tracking with sibling fee bundling
Printable fee receipts with no navigation chrome
Teacher attendance tracking with daily present/absent toggles
Dashboard with overview stats (students, classes, teachers, pending fees)
